title: Romance in the Outfield: Double Play
original_title: Romance in the Outfield: Double Play
overview: While nursing a shoulder injury, a baseball player reunites with his ex-girlfriend — as coaches of rival softball teams — and wonder whether they can rekindle an old flame.
